title: kb.hardline.registered v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/commands/hardline.rs:167) when `kb hardline add` successfully writes a new hardline constraint entry. Source: /kb.

polarity.description: Hardline polarity. Not a closed Rust enum at the type level; commonly 'forbid', 'require', or 'prefer' per current call sites, but left free-form.

file.description: Path of the written hardline entry file.
